title: rbac — model relationships
description: Role + Permission are spatie-extended tables. Their pivot rows (role_has_permissions, model_has_roles, model_has_permissions) carry the denormalised (application_id, tenant_id) tuple for query-plan efficiency. RoleDefinition is the Academorix metadata layer FK-linked to Role. Every principal (User, PlatformUser, ServiceAccount) participates polymorphically via model_has_roles / model_has_permissions.

internal.description: Spatie's own pivot, augmented. Observer enforces guard + application boundaries.
The polymorphic role-holder join. `model_type` is one of `Academorix\User\Models\User` / `Academorix\PlatformUser\Models\PlatformUser` / `Academorix\ServiceAccounts\Models\ServiceAccount`.
Direct permission grants — rare, usually roles carry perms.
Every system role (is_system=true) has exactly one role_definitions row carrying its metadata (business_type_slugs, i18n labels, min_tier, default_permissions[]).

outbound.description: NULL = platform_admin-guard role (cross-Application). Non-null = per-Application role scoped by roles.application_id.
NULL = system role (shipped by Academorix). Non-null = tenant-created custom role scoped to a specific tenant.
NULL = system permission (shipped by a domain module via #[ProvidesPermissions]). Non-null = tenant-created custom permission (Enterprise only).
The reverse of Role→morphedByMany. Polymorphic to User / PlatformUser / ServiceAccount.
The actor who granted the assignment. NULL = system-seeded (TenantDefaultRoleSeeder).
Not a traditional pivot — the slugs are stored in a JSONB array. Denormalised because BusinessType is config-backed (see localization::traits.json § tenancy::BusinessType — no Eloquent model).

inbound.description: Every model composing HasRoles / HasPermissions participates in the RBAC graph. Currently: `User`, `PlatformUser`, `ServiceAccount`. Access/delegation composes HasRoles too on `RoleDelegation` for the delegator lookup pattern.
consumers: access/delegation::RoleDelegation (uses the resolver's DelegationStrategy but doesn't compose the traits)
